overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a walk through Night City's elevated walkways and plazas. The clip begins in overcast daylight with views of the futuristic cityscape and traffic below, transitions past NPCs and a food cart, and ends with a night scene at Watson Apartments Plaza with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city traffic

events.description: woman in red jacket comes into view standing by the railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated walkway overlooking the street and traffic below

notable_agents.action: woman in red jacket and blonde hair standing by railing looking out at city

entered.detail: transparent safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
vent releasing white steam onto the walkway
large blue rectangular planter containing palm trees
tall cyberpunk building with neon signage and glass facade
wet reflective tiled surface of the pedestrian bridge

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The view overlooks a busy street with traffic below, while steam vents release vapor onto the path. A woman in a red jacket stands by the railing looking out at the cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza entrance with food vendor

events.description: passes the woman in red standing by the railing
camera tilts upward to look at the tall building facade

agents.ego_description: walking past the standing woman and approaching a food cart, then looking up at the towering building with red signage

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at cart with colorful umbrella

entered.detail: small food stall with red and yellow umbrella and glowing menu
green metal escalator leading up to higher level
massive dark skyscraper with illuminated red cl logo near top
elevated transit track running above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the walkway, the camera passes the standing woman and approaches a food vendor cart with a colorful umbrella. The camera then tilts up to reveal a massive skyscraper with a distinctive red logo, while an overhead monorail track becomes visible against the gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with benches and overhead transit

events.description: moves from covered walkway into more open plaza area
passes a person sitting on a bench using a device

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing other pedestrians and benches, moving toward the tree-lined area

notable_agents.action: person in suit sitting on blue bench using phone or device

entered.detail: blue modern bench with person seated
tall deciduous tree in the plaza
illuminated vertical sign with purple and white graphics

segments.scene_description: Moving into a more open plaza area with scattered pedestrians and modern benches. The overhead monorail track remains visible while the camera passes a person sitting on a bench using their device. Large planters and trees line the walkway as the environment opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: Watson Apartments Plaza at night with neon illumination

events.description: abrupt transition to night time with neon lighting and reflective wet surfaces
enters Watson Apartments Plaza as indicated by on-screen text

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit plaza at night with highly reflective wet pavement

entered.detail: tall building illuminated with purple and blue neon lights
highly reflective wet ground mirroring the neon lights
tall cylindrical display showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to night at Watson Apartments Plaza. The environment is now illuminated by vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings, reflecting off the wet pavement. The atmosphere shifts from overcast day to a dark cyberpunk night scene with purple and blue lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic cityscape that transforms from an overcast day on an elevated walkway into a neon-lit plaza at night. It begins by gliding along a pedestrian path overlooking busy traffic and steam vents, passing a woman in a red jacket leaning against the railing. As the camera continues forward, it moves past a colorful food vendor cart and tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper with a red logo beneath a gray sky and overhead monorail tracks. The scene then opens into a wider plaza filled with modern benches, planters, and pedestrians before the environment abruptly shifts into the darkness of night at Watson Apartments Plaza. Finally, the atmosphere settles into a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic, with purple and blue neon lights reflecting off the wet pavement.
